title: pterolobium integrum
intro: Pterolobium integrum, also known as the Indian coral tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pterolobium integrum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, Pterolobium integrum can be found in traditional remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and topical applications, often used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
